Jujutsu Kaisen Culling Game in real life!  If you’re a JJK fan in Tokyo, Japan, these locations may seem familiar. 👀  If you look up the names as how they are below on Google Maps you will be led to the exact locations!  1️⃣ The street where Naoya Zenin, Yuji Itadori and Choso fought  📍 Don Quijote Ginza Honkan (it’s the bridge right in front of the store)  2️⃣ The staircase where Yuji and Choso were talking  📍 Kukyo Hall (sorry about the typo on the video!) 3️⃣ The building where Yuta Okkotsu appeared  📍 Courtyard by Marriott Tokyo Ginza Hotel 4️⃣ The street and theater where Yuta and Yuji fought  📍 Kabuki-za 5️⃣ The building that appears in opening theme “AIZO” 📍 Yoyogi Park Art Studio  #jujutsukaisen #呪術廻戦 #주술회전  呪術廻戦  死滅回遊 聖地巡礼 呪術廻戦  死滅回遊 OP AIZO 聖地巡礼 #cullinggame #tokyo

Tokyo Colony No. 1 Tempat Yuji Bertempur #jujutsukaisen #cullingarc #yujiitadori #fyp #gojosatoru

The Sendai Colony is one of the most intense and dangerous battle zones in Jujutsu Kaisen, taking place during the Culling Game arc organized by Kenjaku. It is located in the city of Sendai and, like the other colonies, is surrounded by a powerful barrier that traps participants inside and forces them to fight for survival and points. What makes the Sendai Colony especially unique is the level of fighters present. Unlike other colonies, it quickly turns into a high-level battlefield dominated by extremely powerful sorcerers and curses. Before the main events unfold, the colony is locked in a tense deadlock between several top-tier players: Ryu Ishigori, known for his overwhelming cursed energy output; Takako Uro, who can manipulate the sky itself; Dhruv Lakdawalla, a veteran sorcerer with shikigami abilities; and the special-grade curse Kurourushi. None of them can defeat the others easily, creating a fragile balance of power. This balance is disrupted when Yuta Okkotsu enters the colony. Already a special-grade sorcerer with a large number of points, Yuta quickly begins eliminating threats and shifting the dynamic of the battlefield. His presence forces the strongest players into direct confrontation, leading to some of the most complex and visually impressive fights in the series. One of the highlights is a multi-sided Domain Expansion clash, showcasing advanced techniques and strategy rather than simple brute strength. Throughout the Sendai Colony arc, the focus is not just on power but also on intelligence, adaptability, and timing. Each fighter has abilities that counter others in unique ways, making every battle unpredictable. In the end, Yuta manages to overcome the deadlock, defeat the major opponents, and gain enough points to contribute to changing the rules of the Culling Game. Overall, the Sendai Colony stands out as one of the most important and action-packed parts of Jujutsu Kaisen, highlighting high-level combat, strategic battles, and the growth of Yuta Okkotsu as one of the strongest sorcerers in the series. #Jjk #Jjkseason3 #Manga #Mappa #Fyp
